skills.name: Prediction
skills.description: Keep an eye on front to predict and prepare for the next combat. Temporarily increases your Accuarcy.

skills.name: Linear Shooting
skills.description: After casting, fire the weapon towards to damage enemies in the straight line.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds
Range 250
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Arquebus Barrage
skills.description: If this skill is not during cooldown after casting Arquebusier's attack skill, the cooldown is applied after giving damage in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Dusty Salute
skills.description: Fires shotgun towards the sky, which spreads on the air and damages the enemy in range.

skills.name: Desperate Defense
skills.description: Install a protective barrier to reduce the damage received by the party members within the range and increase the defensive stats.
skills.effect_text:
Duration 30 seconds
Damage received -CaptionRatio %
Block/Critical Resistance + CaptionRatio2 %
AoE Defense Ratio +4

skills.name: Precision Fire
skills.description: During channeling, fires the weapon towards to damage enemies in the straight line.

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dusty Salute: Ceremony
attributes.description: * Accuracy of the Enemy hit by Dusty Salute decreases by 10% against attack from the caster for a moment

attributes.name: Linear Shooting: Amplify Restraint
attributes.description:
* [Stun] the target for 2 seconds when a critical hit is dealt accurately

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Arquebus Barrage: Deactivate
attributes.description:
* Does not cast Arquebus Barrage when activated

* Arquebusier Skill Final Damage +5%

attributes.name: [Arts] Shaped Charge
attributes.description:
* Final Damage of [Linear Shooting] and [Precision Fire] decreases by 25%

* AoE Attack Ratio of [Linear Shooting] and [Precision Fire] increases by 10

attributes.name: [Arts] Shaped Charge
attributes.description:
* Final Damage of [Linear Shooting] and [Precision Fire] decreases by 25%

* AoE Attack Ratio of [Linear Shooting] and [Precision Fire] increases by 10

attributes.name: [Arts] Prediction: Perspective Distortion
attributes.description:
* Remove Accuracy increase effect

* Cooldown changed to 10 seconds

* Select a range and apply a debuff to a maximum of 10 enemies within the 75 range

* AoE Defense Ratio of the target decreases as much as your AoE Attack Ratio

(Does not decrease lower than 1, Debuff can not be stacked)

* Debuff Duration: [skill level * 3] seconds

attributes.name: Desperate Defense: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the Block Chance, Critical Resistance, and decrease damage received effect by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level
